title: Forward-Thinking Business Strategy
scenario: Develop a high-level business strategy for a company looking to expand into new markets. The strategy should include a clear vision, mission, and goals, as well as a plan for achieving success.
constraints: Must include a clear vision statement

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone is forward-thinking and strategic
Verify if the business strategy meets the vision and formatting constraints
Evaluate if the strategy includes a clear plan for achieving success
